contributions.description: Built and open-sourced Xrepo – a collaborative quantum circuit playground with real-time multi-user editing, versioned circuit repository, and Gemini AI assistant.
contributions.impact: Won FOSS Hackathon (1st of 50+ teams); represented PESITM at ADVAYA Pan-India Hackathon

opensource.philosophy: Harsh believes in building tools that are open, accessible, and beneficial to the developer community. The FOSS Hackathon win reflects his commitment to open-source values.
future_plans: Open-source AgentVision X as a public AI observability tool
Contribute to existing AI/ML open-source projects
Publish reusable backend and RAG utility libraries
